name: Perpetual Industries Inc.
summary: Perpetual Industries, Inc. engages in the research, development, and commercialization of energy efficient products. The company is focused on the implementation of environmentally friendly solutions for various industries, including the blockchain industry. It also engages in developing Green Energy Mining System, a crypto mining farm system that enhances the collection of green energy to produce a sustaining mining farm; and WindSilo, a wind turbine for grid tied and off grid applications. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Auburn, Indiana.
